title: Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan
subTitle: Nandini tells Harshad they should stop following FAB5. Alya encourages Dhruv to confess his love to Nandini. Manik and Nandini come closer to each other every passing day.

subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies XX
subTitle: A contestant's remarks backfire, prompting gang leaders to confront her. Further, Prince Narula notably comes to Elvish Yadav's defense.
